channel.title: LaunchList — 2029-Eligible Internships
channel.description: Official internship postings screened for 2029 graduation eligibility.

item.title: Target — Apprentice - Technology
item.description: Bangalore,India — No graduation year listed. JOIN US AS APPRENTICE - Tech About Target As a Fortune 50 company with more than 400,000 team members worldwide, Target is an iconic brand and one of America's leading retailers. At Target, we have a timeless purpose and a proven strategy and that hasn’t happened by accident
